title: Smoky Dense Midnight Cookies Stir-fry
description: A unique fusion of vegan cookies infused with a smoky marinade for a midnight craving treat.

ingredients.name: Marinade Mix (soy sauce, smoked paprika, garlic powder)

instructions: In a small bowl, mix the marinade ingredients and set aside.
Place the cookies in an even layer on a baking sheet. Drizzle half of the marinade mixture over each cookie.
Bake for about 5-7 minutes or until lightly golden brown. Remove from oven.
While the cookies are still warm, sprinkle fresh mint leaves over them and gently stir to incorporate.
Add vegetable oil to a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add remaining marinade mixture and stir-fry for about 1-2 minutes until heated through and fragrant.
